chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Appln. No.S- 93 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 21.07.2025 Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy PG for State along with Inspector Muhammad Ali >>>>>..<<<<< No present for the applicant. No intimation is received. This has been the position of the case since 23.05.2025 till present (last 5 dates of hearing including today’s date of hearing). It appears that the applicant is not interested to pursue the matter. Accordingly, instant Criminal Transfer Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Meanwhile, the concerned SHO has submitted reply of the show cause notice, which is taken on record and the orders passed on the previous date are hereby recalled. Judge ARBROHI/PS
